subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-30 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: Indeed, the hallmarks of this age were all deemed impossible by the wise ones of former times
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی کمالات این قرن همه نزد عقلای قرون سابقه محال بود آیا از پیش کسی گمان مینمود که زنها
subcodes.subjects: @means of establishment of future civilization, @war and peace, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @unity in diversity, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @equality of men and women
